parameters.name: func
parameters.label: Function
parameters.description: Which math function to apply to the channels. All of the functions are unary functions except for the binary functions 'arctan (Input1/Input2)' and 'Input1 ^ Input2'. In the cases of power functions,

parameters.name: baseval
parameters.label: Base Value
parameters.description: The value of the base for 'Log base N' and 'Base ^ Input1'. parameter name

parameters.name: expval
parameters.label: Exponent Value
parameters.description: The value of the exponent for . channel name

parameters.name: angunit
parameters.label: Angle Units
parameters.description: For trigonometric functions, the angles can be measured in Degrees, Radians, or Cycles (0 to 1).

parameters.name: match
parameters.label: Match by
parameters.description: How to pair channels together from the two inputs for the binary functions, by name or by channel index.

parameters.name: error
parameters.label: Error Handling
parameters.description: How to correct samples with math errors:

parameters.name: pinfval
parameters.label: + Infinity Value
parameters.description: Value to use when an infinity error occurs. Caused by sinh(), cosh() and tan().

parameters.name: ninfval
parameters.label: - Infinity Value
parameters.description: Value to use when a negative infinity error occurs. Caused by sinh() and tan().

parameters.name: domval
parameters.label: Domain Error Value
parameters.description: Value to use when a domain error occurs. Caused by asin(), acos(), log10(), logN(), ln() and sqrt().

parameters.name: divval
parameters.label: Divide Error Value
parameters.description: Value to use when a divide by zero error occurs. Caused by pow(x,y).

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
